name: Elementalism

options.label: Beckon Air
options.summary: Create a breeze in a 5-foot Cube.

options.label: Beckon Earth
options.summary: Cover surfaces in a 5-foot-square area with dust or sand, or write one word in dirt or sand.

options.label: Beckon Fire
options.summary: Create harmless embers and chosen color/scent smoke in a 5-foot Cube, with embers able to light small flames.

options.label: Beckon Water
options.summary: Create cool mist in a 5-foot Cube or create 1 cup of clean water that evaporates in 1 minute.

options.label: Sculpt Element
options.summary: Shape dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water fitting in a 1-foot Cube into a crude shape for 1 hour.

modeChoice.notes: The caster chooses exactly one listed Elementalism effect when the spell resolves.

effects.description: Creates one of five minor elemental effects: Beckon Air, Beckon Earth, Beckon Fire, Beckon Water, or Sculpt Element.

controlOptions.name: Beckon Air
controlOptions.effect: Create a breeze strong enough to ripple cloth, stir dust, rustle leaves, and close open doors and shutters.
controlOptions.details: Doors and shutters being held open by someone or something aren't affected.

controlOptions.name: Beckon Earth
controlOptions.effect: Create a thin shroud of dust or sand that covers surfaces in a 5-foot-square area.
controlOptions.details: Alternatively, cause a single word to appear in your handwriting in a patch of dirt or sand.

controlOptions.name: Beckon Fire
controlOptions.effect: Create a thin cloud of harmless embers and colored, scented smoke in a 5-foot Cube.
controlOptions.details: You choose the color and scent; the embers can light candles, torches, or lamps in that area, and the smoke's scent lingers for 1 minute.

controlOptions.name: Beckon Water
controlOptions.effect: Create a spray of cool mist that lightly dampens creatures and objects in a 5-foot Cube.
controlOptions.details: Alternatively, create 1 cup of clean water either in an open container or on a surface; the water evaporates in 1 minute.

controlOptions.name: Sculpt Element
controlOptions.effect: Cause dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water that can fit in a 1-foot Cube to assume a crude shape.
controlOptions.details: The crude shape can be such as that of a creature and lasts for 1 hour.

description: You exert control over the elements, creating one of the following effects within range. Beckon Air. You create a breeze strong enough to ripple cloth, stir dust, rustle leaves, and close open doors and shutters, all in a 5-foot Cube. Doors and shutters being held open by someone or something aren't affected. Beckon Earth. You create a thin shroud of dust or sand that covers surfaces in a 5-foot-square area, or you cause a single word to appear in your handwriting in a patch of dirt or sand. Beckon Fire. You create a thin cloud of harmless embers and colored, scented smoke in a 5-foot Cube. You choose the color and scent, and the embers can light candles, torches, or lamps in that area. The smoke's scent lingers for 1 minute. Beckon Water. You create a spray of cool mist that lightly dampens creatures and objects in a 5-foot Cube. Alternatively, you create 1 cup of clean water either in an open container or on a surface, and the water evaporates in 1 minute. Sculpt Element. You cause dirt, sand, fire, smoke, mist, or water that can fit in a 1-foot Cube to assume a crude shape (such as that of a creature) for 1 hour.
